content: Just as the linguistic definition of reflexion frames it as both a physical process of bouncing light back to its source and a deliberate act of critical introspection, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to replicate this dual function: not only to introspect on the LLM’s own existing outputs, but to 'bounce' reasoning back to the original problem prompt itself to uncover unstated assumptions that led to flawed outputs in the first place.
